positive: A minimalist, modern illustration featuring a large, stylized mountain range silhouette (mountain range silhouette). The mountains should be depicted in varying shades of deep indigo and sapphire blue, creating a cool, ethereal gradient against a clean, pale blush pink or sky beige background. Scattered among the mountains, include small, stylized constellations and crescent moons using metallic gold or copper foil effect accents. The composition should be centered and symmetrical, emphasizing clean lines and strong visual contrast. Style should be cohesive, elegant vector art mixed with negative space design, suitable for a premium streetwear print. High detail, crisp edges, flat graphic design, celestial theme, geometric pattern, highly aesthetic, designed for screen printing.
